referenceSources.source: docs/scope-intake.json and accepted functional mobile prototype
observedDetails: brand inputs guide visual treatment only
prototypeDecisions: style the accepted pages without changing their structure or state

claims.claim: The prototype uses common retail structures and visibly demonstrative mock values.

uiBannedTerms: Replace only with unsupported internal terms that must not appear in UI.

dailyJobs.label: 发送新品预览素材
dailyJobs.trigger: 今日有一项待办需要处理。
dailyJobs.object: 客户 A 与新品预览素材。
dailyJobs.nextAction: 选择示例客户和素材后进入新建群发。
dailyJobs.outcome: 页面显示本次发送已完成。

selfCheck.workMoment: 顾问查看当前需要处理的一项工作。
顾问选择一个明显示例化的收件对象。
顾问完成本次示例发送。
selfCheck.decisionOrAction: 查看结果或返回今日待办。

rejectedPhrases: 最近回写结果（实现语言，不是顾问要做的事）
今日尚未回写（QA/系统状态语言）

experienceContract.firstViewport: Show the confirmed workbench structure, current work, and one dominant next action with readable hierarchy.

primaryJourney.stateChange: The same selected recipient and material reach the native page and produce a visible result.

visualDirection.visualAnchor: A restrained brand accent supports priority and completion states.
visualDirection.imageryRule: Use imagery only when it improves customer or product context.

workbenchVisualPlan.priorityTreatment: One open work item is the single visual focus; explain the reason, due state, and next action in a tappable treatment.
workbenchVisualPlan.queuePattern: Use the confirmed today-list structure without inventing brand-specific priority rules.
workbenchVisualPlan.resultTreatment: Show an honest empty result state first, then a named receipt with outcome and timestamp after the fresh action.
workbenchVisualPlan.brandMaterial: Use one restrained accent plus surface/typography rhythm; do not use editorial imagery to create urgency.
avoid: KPI wall before the priority item
shortcut that duplicates a bottom tab
